description: OpenCode — open-source, provider-agnostic agentic coding CLI; drive cloud or local models (Ollama / LM Studio / any OpenAI-compatible endpoint) through the same PTY
description_zh: OpenCode —— 开源、模型无关的智能编码 CLI；通过同一套 PTY 驱动云端或本地模型（Ollama / LM Studio / 任意 OpenAI 兼容端点）

configSchema.label: Models & Authentication
configSchema.description: OpenCode is provider-agnostic. For local models, just set the Local Endpoint Base URL below (Ollama / LM Studio / vLLM) — opendray auto-discovers the endpoint's models so they appear in /model. For cloud models, run `opencode auth login` once. Settings here are written into a per-session config opendray hands OpenCode via OPENCODE_CONFIG; your own ~/.config/opencode config still applies underneath.
configSchema.description_zh: OpenCode 与模型无关。用本地模型只需在下方填「本地端点 Base URL」（Ollama / LM Studio / vLLM）—— opendray 会自动发现端点上的模型并显示在 /model 里。云端模型先跑一次 `opencode auth login`。这里的设置会写入 opendray 通过 OPENCODE_CONFIG 注入的 per-session 配置；你自己的 ~/.config/opencode 配置仍在底层生效。

configSchema.label: Local Endpoint Base URL
configSchema.description: OpenAI-compatible base URL (Ollama / LM Studio / vLLM). When set, opendray registers a provider named `opendray-local`, auto-discovers every model the endpoint serves, and selects one by default — they all show up in OpenCode's /model picker. This is the only field you need for local models.
configSchema.description_zh: OpenAI 兼容的 base URL（Ollama / LM Studio / vLLM）。填写后 opendray 会注册名为 `opendray-local` 的 provider，自动发现端点上的所有模型并默认选用其一 —— 它们都会出现在 OpenCode 的 /model 选择器里。用本地模型只需填这一项。

configSchema.label: Default Local Model (optional)
configSchema.description: Optional. Pins which discovered model opens by default (used as opendray-local/<id>). Leave blank to default to the first discovered model — all are still available in /model.
configSchema.description_zh: 可选。固定默认打开哪个已发现的模型（用作 opendray-local/<id>）。留空则默认用发现的第一个模型 —— 其余仍可在 /model 切换。

configSchema.label: Local Endpoint API Key
configSchema.label_zh: 本地端点 API 密钥
configSchema.description: Optional API key for the local endpoint. Most local servers ignore it.
configSchema.description_zh: 本地端点的可选 API 密钥。多数本地服务器会忽略它。

configSchema.label: Default Model (provider/model)
configSchema.description: Default model in provider/model form. Overrides the local default above when both are set.
configSchema.description_zh: provider/model 形式的默认模型。与上方本地默认同时设置时，此项优先。

configSchema.label: Bypass Permissions
configSchema.description: Auto-approve every tool action — writes "permission": {"*": "allow"} into the generated OPENCODE_CONFIG. Full autonomous mode; dangerous. Equivalent to OpenCode's --dangerously-skip-permissions, but config-based so it also applies to the interactive TUI.
configSchema.description_zh: 自动批准所有工具操作 —— 往生成的 OPENCODE_CONFIG 写入 "permission": {"*": "allow"}。完全自主模式，危险。等价于 OpenCode 的 --dangerously-skip-permissions，但用 config 实现，对交互式 TUI 也生效。

configSchema.label: Disable opendray skills
configSchema.description: Skip injecting the opendray skill index + memory guidance. Left off (default), opendray writes an AGENTS.md into a per-session scratch dir and references it from the generated OPENCODE_CONFIG instructions; turn this on to suppress that.
configSchema.description_zh: 不注入 opendray skill 索引与记忆引导。默认关闭时 opendray 会在 per-session 临时目录写一份 AGENTS.md，并从生成的 OPENCODE_CONFIG instructions 引用它；打开此项则不再注入。
